name: smrit
description: **SMRIT** is a white-labeled fleet management system (FMS) for the Ethiopian market. It allows fleet operators to track vehicles in real-time, manage drivers, record trips, calculate driver earnings, and generate compliance reports — all under the SMRIT brand.

scripts.test:unit: cd backend/apps/engine-fms && pnpm vitest run src/__tests__/unit
scripts.test:integration: cd backend/apps/engine-fms && pnpm vitest run src/__tests__/integration
scripts.test:smoke: cd backend/apps/engine-fms && pnpm vitest run ../../tests/smoke --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:golden: cd backend/apps/engine-fms && pnpm vitest run ../../tests/smoke/golden-path.test.ts --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:security: cd backend/apps/engine-fms && pnpm vitest run ../../tests/security --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: cd backend && pnpm --filter @smrit/shared-db exec prisma migrate deploy
